message:
feat(cli): add `fcp context` subcommand for multi-mesh operation

Introduce kubectl-style context management for switching between mesh
endpoints. Configuration is stored at ~/.fcp/contexts.toml (or
$FCP_CONFIG_DIR/contexts.toml).

- New `context` subcommand with list/use/create/delete/show sub-commands
- Global `--context` flag to override current context per-invocation
- Context type definitions (ContextConfig, MeshContext) with TOML serde
- Change `#![forbid(unsafe_code)]` to `#![deny(unsafe_code)]` to align
  with workspace lint policy (allows per-item overrides if needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
